title: French Carte Vitale System - Healthcare Coverage Verification
problem: French healthcare needs electronic verification of patient coverage and entitlement to care.
solution: Carte Vitale smart card system for patient identification and coverage verification. Integration with French health insurance (CPAM) for real-time coverage checks. Electronic transmission of care sheets (FSE).
technology: Smart cards, SESAM-Vitale system, real-time coverage verification
varden_fit: CRITICAL — French system has coverage verification but lacks prior auth automation. Opportunity to build on existing infrastructure.
notes: CONTRARIAN: France has coverage verification infrastructure but no prior auth automation. This is the blue ocean.
